$comment: Shotlist schema — the edit decision list the agent writes in PRE-PRO and executes in PRODUCTION/POST. One entry per shot.

characters.name: Mara
characters.wardrobe: weathered olive flight jacket, brass goggles

shots.action: Desert salt flat, a lone monowing aircraft cooling, heat shimmer
shots.start_frame_prompt: Cinematic wide shot, vast white salt flat at golden hour...
shots.video_prompt: Slow dolly push-in across salt flat toward parked monowing aircraft, heat shimmer rising, golden hour, cinematic, 35mm

music.prompt: Sparse desert western score, baritone guitar, slow build

sfx.prompt: wind over open desert, distant metal ticking as engine cools
